creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
(In reply to Mathieu Arnold from comment #6)
I asked if there was a list because only one failure was mentioned, and there was at least one other case known to me (math/maxima) that was a problem that was not mentioned.  It was not clear that there was a list anywhere that was being worked.  Seeing such a list would inform whether I could help and devote some time for fixes.

It sounds like you are actively working on it.  If you want help, let me know.  Otherwise, it's all yours.

The cases I know about have been fixed: bug 250530 and bug 250871
